name: Homemade Sloppy Joe Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl until evenly distributed.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make an airtight packet.
3. Label with date and contents. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months.
Makes 1 packet or about 3 tablespoons of Homemade Sloppy Joe Seasoning Mix.
